title: Noah Lucas homepage v020 clear single-pane liquid glass

source.localSource: v019 release corrected per Noah feedback

changeSummary: Uses clear as the default liquid-glass handling mode.
Collapses the page treatment to one parent feed-band liquid-glass pane over one background image.
Removes per-section and work-card material gradients, shading, backdrop filters, and shadows so child sections are transparent within the pane.
Restores light-theme text to black and dark-theme text to white.
Keeps the background image untinted; light mode fades the image layer to white and dark mode fades it to black.
Keeps the Clear, Ultrathin, Thin, Regular, and Thick selector wired to html[data-glass] and all data-hgl-mode surfaces.

validation.method: Playwright via bundled runtime and system Google Chrome against local v020 preview URL
validation.flowUnderTest: v020 homepage preview -> load Clear default -> inspect parent pane and child sections -> switch glass selector to Thin and back -> switch to dark theme and scroll to lower content.
checks: Default glass is Clear and the selector shows Clear at load.
Parent pane Clear computes to transparent fill, no background image, and one backdrop-filtered pane.
Product, summary, operating-principle, and work-card child sections compute to transparent backgrounds with no gradients or backdrop filters.
Changing the selector to Thin updates html[data-glass], every data-hgl-mode surface, and the computed pane material variables.
Returning to Clear restores html[data-glass], every data-hgl-mode surface, and the clear pane material variables.
Light theme text computes to black; dark theme text computes to white.
At lower scroll after switching to dark theme, html/body/stage backgrounds compute to black and --scene-fade-color is #000000.
The hero image renders with filter none, normal blend mode, and no mask.

supersedesReason: v020 fixes the v019 material and theme regressions by reducing the homepage to one theme-aware clear liquid-glass pane over the background image.

productionValidation.method: Playwright via bundled runtime and system Google Chrome against production noahlucas.com
checks: Production page loaded v020 with Clear as the selected/default glass mode.
Parent pane computed to transparent Clear fill with no background image.
Product, summary, operating-principle, and work-card child sections computed to transparent backgrounds with no gradients or backdrop filters.
Glass selector changed to Thin and back to Clear on the live page.
Dark-theme lower scroll computed html/body/stage backgrounds to black and text to white.
The background image remained untinted with filter none and normal blend mode.

consoleMessages.text: Squarify Dark Mode Toggle was not able to find any toggle element. Make sure you have a link in your Navbar with the URL "squarify-dark-mode-toggle"
